entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea, the crop being studied for seed coat removal characteristics

entities.name: BLANCHABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a peanut genotype to shed its seed coat (testa)

entities.name: BLANCHING
entities.description: The process of removing the seed coat (testa) from peanuts

entities.name: SEED COAT
entities.description: The testa of the peanut seed, which is removed during blanching

entities.name: ICRISAT MINICORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A collection of 184 peanut genotypes used to identify high-blanchability genotypes

entities.name: GWAS
entities.description: Genome-Wide Association Studies used to identify genomic regions responsible for blanchability

entities.name: SNP
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as high-quality genomic data for GWAS

entities.name: AXIOM_ARACHIS ARRAY
entities.description: A 58K array used to identify marker-trait associations

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME RESEQUENCING
entities.description: WGRS used to identify marker-trait associations

entities.name: MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: Associations between genomic markers and the blanchability trait

entities.name: CHROMOSOME AH01
entities.description: Genomic region associated with the blanchability trait

entities.description: Genomic region associated with the blanchability trait

entities.description: Genomic region associated with the blanchability trait

entities.description: Genomic region associated with the blanchability trait

entities.name: CHROMOSOME B07
entities.description: Genomic region associated with the blanchability trait

entities.name: XYLOGLUCAN ENDOTRANSGLUCOSYLASE
entities.description: Candidate gene playing a key role in controlling blanchability
